evidence_scope_policy.frozen_excerpt_scope: Only retained minimal evidence may enter frozen-excerpt correctness denominators.
evidence_scope_policy.production_source_review_scope: Current public-source decisions are reported separately and never promoted into frozen-excerpt accuracy denominators.

cases.relation_meaning: Updates the 2025 Gwangsan Scholarship recruitment deadline to 2025-09-19.
